approvalSource: Steve prioritized a visible parallel builder operating system after the Planck hidden-worker confusion, after the current build-lane reliability cards unless repo truth made it the highest blocker.
scopeSummary: Define visible multi-builder workflow with known worktrees, branches, file ownership, shared locks, merge/commit protocol, status/wrap/blocker reports, hidden-subagent rules, paste-ready prompts, and fail-closed proof without launching builders.
constraints: Do not launch parallel builders during this card.
Do not use hidden subagents as the default workflow.
Do not spawn hidden subagents without explicit Steve approval.
Do not create real worktrees in the focused proof.
